reference: Hello dear, I have gone through your question and understand your concern. You should be worried, but not too much. I suggest: - Dufalac five milliliters daily; - Darolac one capsule daily for one month; - Bepanthen or Pilex cream for the anus; - Diet enriched with beets, gourds, carrots, apple puree, and yogurt. I hope this helps. Wishing your baby good health.
text: Hello, dear. I have gone through your question and understand your concern. You should be worried, but not too much. I suggest you will take five milliliters daily, Darolac one capsule daily for one month, Campden or Pilot's cream for the anus, diet enriched with beans, corns, carrots, apple puree, and yogurt. I hope this helps. Wishing your baby good health.
